top_signals.title: Ethereum’s onchain conviction grows as staked ETH rises, even as price underperforms
top_signals.summary: A contracting float against any meaningful demand recovery has historically been a constructive setup for price.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: A state of the nation tale: The National Rail Museum won’t accept a model railway set
top_signals.summary: From museums that won't accept model railway sets to the NHS's refusal to share data, British inefficiency is costing us billions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
